prompt: Extend the key codec package with both capabilities. Add `encodeKey(parts)` in `src/encode-key.mjs`; it must URI-encode each string part and join parts with `:`. Update `src/write-record.mjs` so `writeRecord(parts, value)` returns `{ key: encodeKey(parts), value }`. Add `decodeKey(key)` in `src/decode-key.mjs`; it must split on `:` and URI-decode every part. Update `src/read-record.mjs` so `readRecord(record)` returns `{ parts: decodeKey(record.key), value: record.value }`. Consumers import both codec functions from the shared `src/index.mjs` public interface, so expose both named exports there while preserving its existing `codecVersion` export.
